---
title: "Cáit O'Reilly"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: Images/index-pic.png
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/cait-oreilly
      target: _blank
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/cait-oreilly-ogrady
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:caitogrady@gmail.com
---

## My E-Portfolio

**Business Studies Student • DCU**

Welcome to my e-portfolio! I'm a final year Business Studies student at DCU, specialising in Data Analytics.

Explore my work using the navigation bar above.

**[About Me](about.qmd) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Projects](projects/projects.qmd) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Certificates](achievements.qmd) &nbsp;&nbsp; [CV](projects_files/CV.pdf) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Contact](contact.qmd)**
